description: The 'Studies' page finishes loading, displaying a list of existing research studies.
frame_description: The main dashboard view of the Askable platform, showing a table of research studies with columns for Title, Type, Status, Quota, Closing date, Created date, and Created by.

description: Cursor hovers over the 'Status' column header in the studies table.
frame_description: The user is reviewing the list of studies, moving the cursor over the table headers.

description: Cursor hovers over the 'Type' column header in the studies table.
frame_description: The cursor moves to the left across the table headers.

description: Cursor hovers over the 'Unmoderated' status label in the first row of the studies list.
frame_description: The cursor moves down to the first item in the list, hovering over its research type.

description: Cursor hovers over the study title 'Daily Poll $0 Incentive Experiment'.
interaction_target: Daily Poll $0 Incentive Experiment study link
frame_description: The cursor lingers over the title of the first study in the list.

description: Cursor hovers over the search input field.
frame_description: The cursor moves up to the search bar above the studies list.

description: User clicks the '+ Create' button to start a new study.
frame_description: The user activates the create button in the top right corner of the interface.

description: A dropdown menu appears with options for creating different types of studies.
frame_description: A menu opens below the Create button, listing options like Interview study, Schedule and conduct remote interviews, etc.

description: Cursor hovers over the 'Interview study' option in the create menu.
frame_description: The user considers the Interview study option in the newly opened menu.

description: Cursor hovers over the search input field after the menu closes.
frame_description: The menu has closed, and the cursor is back over the search bar.

description: Cursor hovers over the '+ Create' button again.
frame_description: The cursor moves back to the Create button.

description: Cursor hovers over the search input field.
frame_description: The cursor moves back to the search bar.

description: Cursor hovers over the '+ Create' button before clicking.
frame_description: The cursor returns to the Create button for a second time.

description: User clicks the '+ Create' button again.
frame_description: The user clicks the Create button again to reopen the menu.

description: The create study dropdown menu opens again.
frame_description: The dropdown menu reappears.

description: Cursor hovers over the 'Interview study' option in the create menu.
frame_description: The user hovers over the Interview study option for over a second before selecting it.

description: User selects 'Interview study' from the dropdown menu.
frame_description: The user clicks on the Interview study option in the list.

description: The browser navigates to the study creation workflow.
frame_description: The screen transitions from the studies list to a loading state for the new study setup.

description: The 'Study Setup' page content renders, showing the 'Study title' step.
frame_description: The loading state ends and the study creation form appears, with 'Study title' as the first step.

description: User clicks into the 'Study title' input field to edit it.
frame_description: The user focuses the text input field which contains a default title.

description: User types 'TV Streaming - Discovery' into the study title field, replacing the default text.
frame_description: The user deletes the existing text and types the new study name. The tab title updates accordingly.

description: Cursor hovers over the 'Next' button.
frame_description: After a pause, the user moves the cursor to the Next button below the title field.

description: User clicks the 'Next' button to proceed to the next step of study setup.
frame_description: The user activates the Next button.

description: A loading animation appears briefly after clicking 'Next'.
frame_description: A small loading spinner appears in the center of the screen.

description: The 'Research method' section of the study setup appears.
frame_description: The UI updates to show the second step of the setup, 'How will you be conducting your research?', with options for Video Call, In-person, etc.
